initialState.notes: Jones activates at the emergency cryo bay, Section A. The Medical Bay (Section C) is two sections forward. The access corridor between Section B and C contains parasitic_organism_corridor — a fully-turned crew member, recently converted, drawn to the vibration of Jones's movement. Encounter is near-certain within exchanges 1-2. This is the mandatory early combat encounter and Fear save trigger. Marsh and Wick are behind the Medical Bay blast door, which Marsh will open via intercom once she confirms a living marine is outside. Wick's degradation timer counts down each time Jones completes a major action without advancing the synthesis protocol. At timer 0, wick_has_turned flips true and parasitic_organism_corridor gains a second active entity in the medical bay. The Draven-organism in Engineering does not move until draven_organism_alerted flips true, which occurs if Jones discharges a firearm in Engineering or accesses the terminal without using Wick's override code.
